title: Orphaned application data
_comment: Config for detecting leftover data from apps that are no longer installed. The tool scans each location for reverse-DNS (bundle-id) named folders whose bundle id is NOT registered with LaunchServices and is NOT covered by skipPrefixes/sharedComponents, then offers to move them to the Trash. 'strip' removes a filename suffix before treating a name as a bundle id. 'sharedComponents' are prefix-matched: they name updaters, crash/analytics SDKs and security agents that legitimately live on disk without an app of their own bundle id being installed — without them they look exactly like orphans.
